text:

    databases/foundationdb*: split, update to 7.1.59 & 7.3.41

    Update FoundationDB to both main supported versions, and also split
    between server and client builds for convenience.

    PR:             277262
    Reviewed by:    dch
    Sponsored by:   SkunkWerks, GmbH
